goal: Improve the internal panel docking UX by making snap behavior more visible when resizing the three main areas in the Omega workspace.
constraints: Modify only src/renderer/src/App.tsx unless a tiny adjacent import/type adjustment is strictly required.
Do not remove or weaken the existing panel layout lock behavior, popout behavior, or saved layout behavior.
Keep the current Omega dark visual language.
Build on the existing snapPanelLayout / handleMainPanelLayout / handleTopPanelLayout logic instead of replacing the architecture.
success_criteria: While resizing internal panels, the UI gives a clearer visible hint when a snap point is being hit or is about to be applied.
The implementation remains scoped to the workspace layout UX and does not disturb unrelated panels or timeline behavior.
The existing panel snapping and persistence still work.
